translated: If you follow Jesus, you will live, and if you follow the world, you will die. For the world will pass away, but whoever does the will of God lives forever.

translated: Jesus said to them, “Truly I tell you, unless you change and become like little children, you will never enter the kingdom of heaven. Whoever humbles themselves like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. And whoever receives one such child in my name receives me; but whoever causes one of these little ones who believe in me to sin, it would be better for him to have a large millstone hung around his neck and to be drowned in the depth of the sea.
